title: rubus pyrenaicus
intro: Rubus pyrenaicus, also known as the Pyrenean raspberry or Alpine raspberry, is a species of raspberry native to the Pyrenees mountains in Europe. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rubus pyrenaicus include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and support immune function, making it a potential natural remedy for various health conditions. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and its leaves and roots can also be used in jams, preserves, and other culinary applications.
